member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.LoaderArgs.DllPathToLoad
member.summary: Gets or sets the Dll path to load.

member.name: P:Prime.Kernel.LoaderArgs.TestMethodNameSpace
member.summary: Gets or sets the TestMethod namespace.

member.name: T:Prime.Kernel.PrimeLoader
member.summary: PrimeLoader is an helper class for PrimeKernel to instantiate TestMethods in target AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeLoader.CreateInstanceInAppDomain(System.AppDomain)
member.summary: Create new instance of PrimeLoader in the target AppDomain.
member.returns: New PrimeLoader instance at the target AppDomain.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeLoader.CreateTestInstance(Prime.Kernel.LoaderArgs)
member.summary: Create new test instance at the AppDomain PrimeLoader resides in.
member.returns: New instance in the AppDomain as ITestMethod.

member.name: M:Prime.Kernel.PrimeLoader.IsDebugDll(System.String)
member.summary: Check if specific AppDomain is required for this dll. A specific AppDomain is required only when the dll compiled in Debug - meaning the user might be the support of DynamicReload.
member.param: The path of the dll to load.
member.returns: true if specific AppDomain is required.
